name: lemon-cake
display_name: LemonCake — Give your AI agent a wallet
description: Pay-per-call USDC payments for any HTTP API. Lets AI agents bill themselves through scoped Pay Tokens with hard spending caps, with a marketplace of pre-integrated services (Serper, Hunter.io, Firecrawl, gBizINFO, 国税庁 invoice check, etc.) and Japanese tax compliance baked in.
long_description:
LemonCake is an MCP server that gives any AI agent a wallet. Instead of asking users for 15 different API keys, the agent presents one Pay Token (a JWT with a hard USDC cap, expiry, and service scope) and LemonCake handles per-call billing across the whole marketplace.

What works out of the box:
- list_services / call_service for the marketplace (Serper, Hunter.io, Firecrawl, Jina Reader, IPinfo, OpenExchangeRates, Slack, gBizINFO, 国税庁 invoice check, e-Gov 法令, AbstractAPI VAT, AfterShip, Coze test echo, and more — 16+ live services)
- check_balance for USDC remaining
- check_tax for Japanese qualified-invoice / source-withholding compliance
- get_service_stats for aggregate marketplace numbers
- setup for an interactive on-boarding walkthrough (no auth required)

Demo mode: if no Pay Token / Buyer JWT is set, the server boots in DEMO MODE so reviewers and curious users can call demo_search / demo_echo / demo_fx without signing up. This lets you exercise the whole tool surface (including call_service) before handing over money.

Safety model: the agent is given a Pay Token JWT with limitUsdc / scope / expiresAt baked in. The agent physically cannot exceed the cap, regardless of prompt-injection or runaway loops. Token revocation is instant.

Learn more: https://lemoncake.xyz | https://github.com/evidai/lemon-cake

pay_token.title: Pay Token (JWT)
pay_token.description: Pay Token from your LemonCake dashboard (https://lemoncake.xyz/dashboard). Required for `call_service`. Leave empty to run in DEMO MODE (no real USDC, mock services only). The token has a hard USDC cap, expiry, and service scope baked in — your agent physically cannot exceed these.

buyer_jwt.title: Buyer JWT
buyer_jwt.description: Buyer JWT from your LemonCake dashboard. Required for `check_balance`. Leave empty to use DEMO MODE which returns a mock $1.00 balance.

api_url.title: API base URL
api_url.description: LemonCake API base URL. Leave empty to use the production endpoint (https://api.lemoncake.xyz).

tools.name: setup
tools.description: Interactive on-boarding: shows what credentials you have, what's missing, and how to get them. No auth required.

tools.name: list_services
tools.description: List approved API services available in the marketplace (Serper, Hunter.io, gBizINFO, etc.). No auth required. Returns id, name, provider, pricePerCall, and per-service usage hint (path/method/body) so the agent can construct the correct call_service request without trial-and-error.

tools.name: call_service
tools.description: Invoke an upstream API service through the pay-per-call proxy. Charges USDC against the Pay Token. Returns upstream response verbatim plus chargeId and amountUsdc. 4xx responses include a structured `hint` field with actionable guidance (e.g. 401=auth issue, 402=balance exhausted, 422=service uneconomical). Requires LEMON_CAKE_PAY_TOKEN.

tools.name: check_balance
tools.description: Returns current USDC balance, KYC tier, and account info. Requires LEMON_CAKE_BUYER_JWT.

tools.name: check_tax
tools.description: Japanese tax compliance check: qualified-invoice (適格請求書) registration validation against 国税庁, plus source-withholding (源泉徴収) determination. Returns the registration name, validity, and whether withholding applies for the given amount. No auth required.

tools.name: get_service_stats
tools.description: Aggregate marketplace usage statistics (call count, top services, unique buyers). No auth required.

prompts.name: explore-demo
prompts.description: Walk through demo_search → demo_fx → demo_echo to see the call_service plumbing without spending real USDC.

prompts.name: discover-marketplace
prompts.description: Discover all marketplace services and pick one based on price + use case.

prompts.name: japan-tax-check
prompts.description: Validate a Japanese invoice number (T + 13 digits) and determine source-withholding for a given amount.

prompts.name: spend-with-budget
prompts.description: Demonstrate hard-cap spending: call a service with a strict USDC budget that the agent cannot exceed.

prompts.name: real-vs-demo
prompts.description: Compare a demo service response against a real upstream response to validate plumbing before going live.

prompts.name: japan-finance-bundle
prompts.description: Run a Japan-flavored research bundle: corporate lookup (gBizINFO) → invoice number validation (国税庁) → tax compliance summary.
